claim_shape: (Currently Amended) A computer-implemented method comprising:obtaining, from one or more image sensors, a first set of image data corresponding to an environment; processing the first set of image data using a first machine learning algorithm to yield annotated image data that identifies at least one object within the environment; processing the annotated image data using a second machine learning algorithm to determine one or more attributes associated with the at least one object within the environment; [[and]] generating, based on the one or more attributes, an evidence package corresponding to the at least one object within the environment, the evidence package being configured to facilitate a determination of one or more action items associated with the at least one object[[.fl; obtaining , from one or more imag e sensors, a second set of imag e data corresponding to the environment; processing the second set of imag e data to identify a change in the one or more attributes associated with the at least one object within the environment; and determining, based on the chang e in the one or more attributes, that the one or more action items associated with the at least one object are complete. Currently amended 2
remedy: Examiner's ground: Claims 1-2, 6-7, 10, 14-15, and 18-19 are rejected under 35 U.S.C. 102(a)(1) as being anticipated by Yuan et al. (“Patrol Agent: An Autonomous UAV Framework for Urban Patrol Using on board Vision Language Model and on cloud Large Language Model”).
